confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule: Route all queries to BASELINE; no certified SLM region.
confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: Route all queries to BASELINE; no certified SLM region.

confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule: Route all queries to BASELINE; no certified SLM region.
confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: Route all queries to BASELINE; no certified SLM region.

confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule: SLM if score <= 0.0000; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.0000 < score < 0.0100; BASELINE otherwise.
confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: SLM if score <= 0.0000; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.0000 < score < 0.0100; BASELINE otherwise.

confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule: SLM if score <= 0.1810; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.1810 < score < 0.3017; BASELINE otherwise.
confidence_certified_routing_policy.route_rule_with_abstention: SLM if score <= 0.1810; HYBRID_ABSTAIN if 0.1810 < score < 0.3017; BASELINE otherwise.
